lessons.title: IPv4 Basics: Bits and Dots
lessons.description: Understand the 32-bit structure of an IP address and why we write it like 192.168.1.1.

lessons.title: Network Masks & CIDR
lessons.description: Learn how a subnet mask tells a device which part is the 'network' and which is the 'host'.

lessons.title: Subnetting: The Great Divide
lessons.description: Borrow bits to create smaller, more secure network segments.

lessons.title: Subnetting Practice & Shortcuts
lessons.description: Master the 'Magic Number' method to calculate subnets in seconds.

lessons.title: VLSM: Variable Length Subnet Masking
lessons.description: Stop wasting IP addresses. Fit the subnet size exactly to the need.

lessons.title: Private, Public, and NAT
lessons.description: How billions of devices share a limited pool of public addresses and stay hidden.
